_schema.area: infra | ui | audio | pwa | ci | ux

features.title: E2E tests en CI/CD homelab
features.description: Playwright smoke tests corriendo en .103 (cicd) post-deploy, apuntando a app en .104:5177. Imagen en registry local.

features.title: Wim Hof — phase sync via ticks
features.description: WimHofTimer.jsx actualmente usa HTMLAudioElement crudo sin coordinación de fases. Conectar al sistema de ticks igual que HIIT/Tabata.

features.title: Generic MP3 player across all timers
features.description: Allow playing lofi Pomodoro tracks inside HIIT/Tabata workout with Ticks, and vice versa. Player should be app-wide, not per-timer.

features.title: Pomodoro improvements
items: Default to lofi instead of ticking sound
Option to disable auto-advance between sessions
Hide non-critical text at very small viewports, show only essentials
Fix repeat track button — currently restarts instead of looping
Rotate between track name and volume slider instead of showing slider always

features.title: Fix circular progress rings — Pomodoro and Tabata
features.description: Rings must advance in real time. Outer = total progress, inner = current phase.

features.title: Breathing timer circles
features.description: Redesign circles to match or improve on HIIT/Tabata circular progress style. Design reference: Lovable.

features.title: PWA orientation — let device decide
features.description: manifest.json previously forced landscape. Changed to orientation:any + display:standalone so the device decides. Fixed in manifest.json (commit 773f602).

features.title: Landscape layout broken on mobile
features.description: In horizontal orientation all elements are centered and cramped with no layout distribution. Needs proper responsive layout — take Lovable horizontal design as reference.

features.title: Setup screen config icon does nothing
features.description: The gear/config icon shown at the top of the setup screen is not interactive. Either wire it up or remove it.

features.title: Confirm before leaving when timer is running (swipe + back button)
features.description: Fuses #8, #10, #24. When HIIT or Tabata timer is running: (1) swipe-left/right gesture shows confirmation dialog instead of navigating immediately, (2) browser back button / popstate also confirms, (3) onBackClick button confirms. Swipe threshold increased 50→80px to reduce false triggers.

features.title: Back from timer goes to home instead of setup
features.description: Pressing back from an active timer should return to that timer's setup/config screen, not to the home grid.

features.title: Audio continues after navigating back to home
features.description: When playing HIIT/Tabata music mode and pressing back, audio does not stop and no alert is shown. Should: pause the timer, show a 'Now Playing' badge on the timer card in home, and allow resuming from the same position when re-entering the timer.

features.title: Wim Hof — Spanish MP3 audio
features.description: Add a Spanish-language MP3 guide for the Wim Hof breathing timer.

features.title: Parental advisory — 14+ audio content warning
features.description: Add a parental advisory notice for audio content rated for ages 14 and up.

features.title: Wim Hof credits
features.description: Add proper attribution/credits for Wim Hof audio and method.

features.title: Auto language detection — Spanish for LATAM/Spain
features.description: Default to Spanish (es) for users in Latin America and Spain; default to English (en) for all other regions. Use browser locale or Accept-Language header.

features.title: Fix breathing timer responsiveness in landscape
features.description: Breathing timers are broken in horizontal/landscape orientation. Fix layout distribution.

features.title: i18n: 'boxeo 1-2' not translated in English
features.description: The text 'boxeo 1-2' (boxing combo cue) is not translated when app language is English. Find the key and add EN translation.

features.title: Auto-hide floating button labels (e.g. 'Beeps on')
features.description: Button labels above controls (like 'Beeps on') remain visible permanently. Should auto-hide after a few seconds of inactivity, similar to video player controls.

features.title: HIIT active view — fix vertical distribution
features.description: Vertical layout in HIIT active view is not well distributed. Elements are cramped or misaligned. Needs proper spacing and proportional vertical distribution.

features.title: Confetti — animate from screen center
features.description: Confetti on workout completion currently does not emit from the center of the screen. Should burst from center outward.

features.title: HIIT circular progress — inner and outer rings must animate clockwise
features.description: Inner and outer circular progress rings in HIIT active view are completely static. Must animate clockwise as time progresses. Copy animation approach from reference project.

features.title: HIIT/Tabata: completed state resets on re-entry
features.description: After finishing a workout, navigating back to home and re-entering the timer shows 'Complete' instead of resetting to the start state. User must manually press Reset to begin again. On re-entry from home, state should auto-reset to initial.

features.title: Breathing timers — stacked carousel/spinner navigation
features.description: Box, Calming, Relaxing, and Wim Hof breathing timers are accessed from separate cards on the home grid. Stack them into a single entry with a vertical spinner or carousel to swipe between them, reducing clutter on the home screen.
